eventType.description: Dot-separated event identifier (e.g. item.viewed, search.performed, sync.completed, workspace.opened). Free-form — new event types do not require a spec change.

actor.description: Identity string of who triggered this event.

targetId.description: UUID of the item this event relates to. null for workspace-level events that do not relate to a single item.

data.description: Event-specific detail (e.g. the search query, the export format). Structure is determined by eventType. null when no additional data is needed.
